summary: Smoke + integration testing of Voltline Electrical site. All backend endpoints (root, health, leads CRUD, stats, validation) pass. Frontend home, gallery filters, contact form submission, and admin (stats, filter, status PATCH, delete) all work end-to-end against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL with 0 console errors.
passed: POST /api/leads valid payload -> 201 with auto id, status='new', ISO created_at
GET /api/leads -> 200, sorted newest first (verified via created_at)
PATCH /api/leads/{id} valid status updates to 'contacted' (200); invalid status -> 422; unknown id -> 404
Frontend home '/' loads, VOLTLINE header visible, gallery + form render, 0 console errors
Gallery filter buttons (all/commercial) correctly filter project cards (commercial=1, all=6)
Contact form: filled inputs (name/email/phone/service_type SELECT/address/message), submitted via contact-submit, contact-success state shown; lead persisted (visible in admin)
Admin '/admin' loads, stat tiles show counts (Total/New reflecting DB)
Admin filter button 'new' filters lead list correctly
Admin status update button (lead-status-contacted-{id}) issues PATCH and updates UI
Admin delete button (lead-delete-{id}) removes lead after confirm, list and stats update (toast 'Lead deleted')
notes: Hero text exact-string locator did not match (likely due to letter-spacing splitting characters in the DOM), but page rendered correctly — not a functional bug. No further action required.
